ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carbon_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "soc" REAL /* Soil Organic Carbon (SOC) level */,
  "doc" REAL /* Dissolved Organic Carbon (DOC) level */,
  "mbc" REAL /* Microbial Biomass Carbon (MBC) level */,
  "co2" REAL /* Carbon Dioxide (CO2) level */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for data collection */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil where the data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "location" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., SOC, DOC, MBC, CO2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor type */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Field A, Field B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for data collection */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data collection event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data collection event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the data collection event */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES carbon_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the generated report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data collection method, sensor calibration, or data processing algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version used for data collection and analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the version history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES carbon_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "team_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first research team */,
  "team_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second research team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the collaboration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
